Audit Reasons:

  • TransUnion: [metro2_accountStatus_mismatch] Account status differs across bureaus: TUC and EXP report 'Open' while EQF reports 'Paid'.. Consider disputing "Account status differs across bureaus: TUC and EXP report 'Open' while EQF reports 'Paid'." with the credit bureau or contacting the creditor for correction.
    FCRA: 15 U.S.C. §1681s-2 - furnishers must provide accurate information and correct errors
    FDCPA: 15 U.S.C. §1692e - prohibits false or misleading representations
  • TransUnion: [metro2_highCredit_mismatch] High credit amount differs across bureaus: EQF reports 0 while TUC and EXP report 60.. Consider disputing "High credit amount differs across bureaus: EQF reports 0 while TUC and EXP report 60." with the credit bureau or contacting the creditor for correction.
    FCRA: 15 U.S.C. §1681s-2 - furnishers must provide accurate information and correct errors

Consider disputing "Account status differs across bureaus: TUC and EXP report 'Open' while EQF reports 'Paid'." with the credit bureau or contacting the creditor for correction.

    FCRA: 15 U.S.C. §1681s-2(a)(1)(A) - furnishers must report accurate balance information
    FDCPA: 15 U.S.C. §1692e(2)(A) - prohibits false representation of the amount owed

    FCRA: 15 U.S.C. §1681e(b) - agencies must ensure maximum possible accuracy of payment history
    FDCPA: 15 U.S.C. §1692e(8) - bars communicating false credit information

Consider disputing "The account is derogatory but does not report a Date of First Delinquency, preventing verification of legal reporting period and raising re-aging concerns." with the credit bureau or contacting the creditor for correction.

Consider disputing "The account is reported as delinquent or charged off but does not include a Date of Last Payment, making the delinquency timeline unverifiable." with the credit bureau or contacting the creditor for correction.
    FCRA: 15 U.S.C. §1681e(b) - agencies must ensure maximum possible accuracy of payment history
    FDCPA: 15 U.S.C. §1692e(8) - bars communicating false credit information

    FDCPA: 15 U.S.C. §1692e - prohibits false or misleading representations
